notes: v2.4.15 — Purchasing fixes and refinements: inline editing saves everywhere again (PO line price, quantity, description, and due date; requisition details and line items); Cancel and PO status changes apply correctly; approvals go through for the whole approval list; vendor search no longer blanks the screen; purchase orders show the correct requester and creator; PO and REQ search match creator and requester names; filter POs by multiple vendors; the per-line Due column is back; softer status-chip colors and a Purchase Orders table that fits without sideways scrolling; and copying from a prior REQ works. Operations Planner — Sections: a new level above groups (board, section, group, item) with its own name, color, and collapse state, an Add Section toolbar button, and no more hover page-jump. Subitems and watching: one-click Change parent for subitems, a CC-self toggle in the item detail panel, and CC badges on every board, the Gantt sidebar, and Kanban. Gantt: subitems sit in a soft parent-colored container, Left and Right arrow keys plus a horizontal scroll wheel navigate months, the rightmost day columns are no longer clipped, and collapsing the planner sidebar gives the Gantt more room. Collapsed sidebar: every board is reachable (the icon column scrolls) and boards are grouped by type. Global navbar: constant height on ultrawide and 4K monitors, fixing the toolbar overlap.
